response.overview: A group of students from various backgrounds, Iqsan (Mark Adam), Zubir (Zaki Azeman), Fahmi (Farhan Mazlan), Leha (Tracie Sinidol) and Aina (Aween Ismail) are placed in an old residential college throughout the semester break. They all do not return home for their own reasons. Among these are financial constraints, shame and motivation to become excellent students. The disturbances caused by the ghost of a Japanese soldier also plague them while they are busy practicing for a performance to commemorate Independence Day. A cursed bottle that was opened by Fahmi makes the situation more chaotic. Various types of supernatural beings begin to make their appearance. Among them are the pontianak, the skeleton and the bunian! Each has a story behind their presence. Although this matter certainly causes chaos, it has also strengthened the bonds of friendship among these five students. What is the fate of the mystical disturbances they face?
response.title: Puaka Cuti Semester
